hero.title: Full-Spectrum Technology Services
hero.subtitle: From strategy to execution to operations — eight practice areas delivered through one seamless model that scales with your business.

items.title: AI Solutions
items.desc: Custom LLMs, AI agents, computer vision, NLP, and intelligent automation tailored to your industry.

items.title: Cloud Services
items.desc: AWS, Azure, GCP architecture, cloud migration, Kubernetes, serverless, and infrastructure optimization.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: High-performance React, Next.js, and full-stack web applications with enterprise-grade architecture.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.desc: Cross-platform iOS & Android apps with React Native and Flutter — beautiful, fast, and scalable.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.desc: Research-driven product design, design systems, prototyping, and user testing for exceptional experiences.

items.title: Process Automation
items.desc: RPA, workflow automation, intelligent document processing, and integration platforms that eliminate manual work.

items.title: Digital Marketing
items.desc: Data-driven SEO, performance marketing, content strategy, and analytics that convert traffic to revenue.

items.title: Enterprise Software
items.desc: Custom ERP, CRM, and SaaS platforms engineered for scale, security, and long-term business value.

process.title: Discover
process.desc: We dig into your goals, constraints, and users to define the problem precisely before writing a line of code.

process.title: Design
process.desc: Architecture, UX, and a delivery roadmap — validated through prototypes and aligned with stakeholders.

process.title: Build
process.desc: Agile sprints, continuous delivery, and transparent progress with production-grade engineering standards.

process.title: Scale
process.desc: Launch, monitor, and optimize. We stay on as a long-term partner to grow what we build together.

hero.title: Work That Speaks for Itself
hero.subtitle: A selection of platforms we've engineered for global teams — measured by the outcomes they delivered.

items.title: Enterprise CRM Platform
items.desc: A next-generation CRM built for a 2,000-seat global sales team. Real-time deal scoring via ML, GPT-powered meeting summaries, and a unified customer data graph reduced sales cycle by 34%.

items.title: Healthcare Automation System
items.desc: End-to-end patient workflow automation for a regional hospital network. AI triage, intelligent scheduling, and NLP-powered clinical notes cut administrative overhead by 60% across 12 facilities.

items.title: FinTech Analytics Dashboard
items.desc: Real-time risk and portfolio analytics platform for a mid-market hedge fund. Sub-50ms data pipelines, predictive volatility models, and executive dashboards that visualize $2B+ AUM in real time.

items.title: E-Commerce Growth Engine
items.desc: Headless commerce platform with AI-driven personalization for a D2C brand doing $80M ARR. Recommendation engine, dynamic pricing, and predictive inventory management boosted revenue 28% YoY.

items.title: Smart Logistics Cloud
items.desc: A real-time fleet and warehouse orchestration platform processing 4M events per day. Route optimization and predictive maintenance reduced fuel costs by 19% across a 1,200-vehicle fleet.

items.title: EdTech Learning Platform
items.desc: An adaptive learning platform serving 300K students. AI-personalized curriculum paths and automated grading lifted course completion rates by 41% in the first academic year.

hero.title: Let's Build Something Intelligent
hero.subtitle: Tell us about your challenge. Our team responds within 24 hours with a tailored proposal or a free 30-minute strategy session.

faqs.q: How quickly can we get started?
faqs.a: Most engagements kick off within one to two weeks of our initial strategy call, depending on scope and team availability.

faqs.q: Do you work with early-stage startups?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We tailor our delivery model to fit teams of every size — from pre-seed startups to global enterprises.

faqs.q: What does a typical engagement cost?
faqs.a: Pricing depends on scope, timeline, and complexity. After a discovery call we provide a transparent, fixed-scope proposal.

faqs.q: Can you augment our existing team?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer dedicated squads and staff augmentation that integrate directly with your in-house engineering and product teams.
